name: Abandoned Campground
oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless a player has 13 or less life.

name: Acrobatic Cheerleader
oracle_text: Survival — At the beginning of your second main phase, if this creature is tapped, put a flying counter on it. This ability triggers only once.

Reach
When this creature enters, you may discard a card or pay {2}. When you do, destroy target Room.

Flash
Whenever this creature attacks, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

Flash

name: Bleeding Woods
oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless a player has 13 or less life.

flavor_text: They say if someone lies down to sleep beneath the trees, in the morning nothing will remain but a few scattered bones and a bed of blood-red lilies.

oracle_text: When this creature enters, you may sacrifice another creature or enchantment. When you do, this creature deals 2 damage to any target.

Deathtouch

oracle_text: Survival — At the beginning of your second main phase, if this creature is tapped, you gain 2 life.

Haste

Vigilance
Whenever this creature attacks, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)
